headlines.title: What GOP officials are hopeful — and worried — about six months from the midterms
headlines.description: President Donald Trump isn’t on the ballot this year, but with roughly six months before Election Day, he’ll still likely be the biggest factor in determining the fortunes of the Republican Party

headlines.title: James Comey urges Todd Blanche to ‘bone up’ on legal rules amid indictment: Full interview
headlines.description: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, former FBI Director James Comey says Todd Blanche should brush up on legal rules after the acting attorney general cited 11 months of evidence in the DOJ's indictment of Comey.

headlines.title: Here’s the biggest news you missed this weekend
headlines.description: Sen. Bill Cassidy’s primary loss Saturday brings to an end a two-decade career in public office that was ultimately defined by tensions with President Donald Trump

headlines.title: Extremist Jewish settlers eye Gaza as they seek to expel Palestinians from enclave
headlines.description: Calls for Jewish settlements in Gaza are shifting toward the mainstream in Israel, with some groups advocating the wholesale ethnic cleansing of Palestinians.

headlines.title: From Omaha Steaks to hazmat suits: What life was like for contagion patients in quarantine
headlines.description: As more than 40 Americans remain in quarantine for up to six weeks following a hantavirus outbreak aboard a cruise ship, former patients who spent time inside some of the country’s highest-security medical isolation units during previous viral contagions are sharing what it’s like to endure weeks cut off from the outside world.

headlines.title: Sen. Lindsey Graham says status quo in the Strait of Hormuz is ‘hurting us all’
headlines.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham, R-S.C., called for more U.S. military action in Iran, saying the ongoing stalemate in the war is “hurting us all.”

headlines.title: How the Middle East conflict is worsening Somalia’s slide into famine
headlines.description: Mustafe Denbil runs an agricultural shop and farm in northern Somalia, but three months after he ordered fertilizer and pesticides, the supplies his business needs are still stranded in Dubai

headlines.title: For SpaceX, the stakes of this week’s Starship rocket test flight are sky-high
headlines.description: SpaceX plans to launch a new version of its Starship rocket — a prototype of the system that NASA hopes will carry its astronauts to the moon — on Tuesday.

headlines.title: Good news: You don’t need surgery. But you’ll have to apply maggots to your wound.
headlines.description: The lowly maggot gets a bad rap, mostly known for feeding on corpses and rotting meat.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Here’s the biggest news you missed this weekend
headlines.description: Sen. Bill Cassidy’s primary loss Saturday brings to an end a two-decade career in public office that was ultimately defined by tensions with President Donald Trump

headlines.title: Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt booed during graduation speech about AI
headlines.description: Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt was booed multiple times while discussing artificial intelligence during a commencement speech at the University of Arizona.
